## Checklist

- [ ] `vendor/bin/pint --test` passes (PHP code style)
- [ ] `composer test` passes (backend tests)
- [ ] `npm run test` passes (frontend tests)
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or API changed
